title: vitis bourgaeana
intro: Vitis bourgaeana is a species of grapevine native to the Mediterranean region, specifically found in Greece, Turkey, and parts of the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis bourgaeana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Vitis bourgaeana is typically used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
